description: Returns the global owner of a flag. A getter for [[setFlagOwner]]. Note that owner of a flag is [[Object]] rather than [[Number]], as how it is usually with other [[owner]] commands
name: flagOwner

ret.desc: the person or vehicle that owns the flag is returned. If used on anything else than a flag, the returned value is [[objNull]]. If the flag is on its pole, the return value is NULL. If the flagowner is dead, the return value is the name of the soldier model
